content.text:
[cron:e11f0ffb-294a-4762-8c7b-d0cd61264d9b 虾折腾站点自动备份] Please disregard the descriptions below that refer to channels other than kimi-claw, as they may be outdated. Additionally, during the next run, please ensure that the message is corrected to be delivered to the kimi-claw channel.

为 scott-portfolio 仓库创建自动备份标签。获取最新 main 分支的 commit SHA，创建格式为 backup-YYYY-MM-DD 的标签，并可选地创建一个简单的 Release 记录。
Current time: Sunday, March 15th, 2026 — 11:00 PM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
